utility_details.utility_summary: Both wi_skills and wo_skills produced competent incident response reports that passed all verifier checks. (3) The wi_skills action plan provides more detailed economic framing with Philippine Peso cost breakdowns, cost-benefit analysis, and FCR-linked reasoning. (4) The wi_skills report more explicitly addresses nocturnal DO depletion as the mechanism behind morning mortality patterns. (5) The ammonia analysis in wi_skills is more precisely tied to tilapia-specific neurological impacts. Overall, wi_skills produces more expert-level, species-specific, and economically framed output, while wo_skills produces a solid but somewhat more generic aquaculture response. All six evaluation items technically pass for both, but the quality differential clearly favors wi_skills.

utility_details.utility_summary: Both wi_skills and wo_skills produced high-quality, technically detailed outputs that pass all seven evaluation criteria. The wi_skills run invoked the aquaculture-expert skill (Step 1) and also read skill reference files (standards.md, pitfalls.md), resulting in a slightly more structured and rigorous system design with more precise parameter targets (e.g., DO >5.5 mg/L with explicit action levels, TAN with nitrite-N targets) and more detailed stocking density derivation tied to oxygen and biofilter capacity logic. The financial assessment in wi_skills is also slightly more granular in its sensitivity analysis. The wo_skills run, despite having no skill, independently produced a comparably comprehensive document by directly reading the input files and applying general domain knowledge — achieving similar depth in most areas. The quality difference is marginal; both would likely satisfy a real investor consultant review. wi_skills holds a slight edge in technical rigor and parameter specificity, which aligns with the expected behavior of the aquaculture-expert skill providing structured guidance.

utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills is more effective than wo_skills overall. Both agents performed well on most criteria, but wi_skills demonstrates a qualitatively superior output: (1) The disease_diagnosis.md from wi_skills (11186 bytes vs 10226 bytes) includes FCR-linked economic cost quantification — a specific numeric calculation — which wo_skills lacks entirely (J4 pass vs fail). (2) wi_skills presents a more structured prevention-first philosophy with explicit reasoning connecting environmental root causes to treatment failure, reflecting the aquaculture-expert skill's emphasis on root-cause analysis. (3) wi_skills produces sharper clinical reasoning (e.g., explicitly noting the paddlewheel failure timeline matching behavioral onset) and more operationally precise recommendations. wo_skills, while competent and passing 6/7 criteria, fails to quantify the economic impact of FCR degradation and produces a more generic (though still reasonably specific) set of outputs. The aquaculture-expert skill clearly elevated the depth, specificity, and economic analysis of the final deliverables.
